title: Kenyan Lamb Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic Kenyan-inspired lamb biryani dish, made with tender lamb, fluffy rice, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pan and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil to the pan.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the biryani spice blend and lamb biryani masala and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
Return the lamb to the pan and stir to combine with the rice.
